description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:stable Docker image with the docker:stable-dind service. Add a before_script that runs "apk add --no-cache git git-lfs make docker-compose" and then "git lfs pull -I '*'" to install tools and fetch all LFS objects. Define a single stage named build and a job called build that runs in the build stage and executes the command "make". No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are specified.
